name: primetrade-assignment
description: Scalable REST API with Authentication & Role-Based Access Control and React Frontend Dashboard

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
